rationale: Educ. Code §12.017 governs Voting Rights Act preclearance for school district charters. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: The secretary of state shall determine whether a proposed charter contains a change in the governance of the school district.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no conflict identified.
